name: Sears Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: $15 off first purchase with the Sears Mastercard

earning_rates.notes: 20 points per $1 (2% back) at Sears, Kmart, and Sears Home Services
10 points per $1 (1% back) on all other eligible purchases

other_benefits.name: Shop Your Way Rewards
other_benefits.description: Points redeemable through Shop Your Way rewards program

notes: IMPORTANT: The Sears Mastercard (Synchrony) has been discontinued/transferred to Citi — the Sears Mastercard became the Citi ThankYou Mastercard. The Shop Your Way Mastercard is now issued by Citi. Mark this record as historical/reference only. No longer available as new Synchrony product. The Sears store card may still be with Synchrony.
